texto: Whether they are raised in indigenous or modern culture, there are two things that people crave: the full realization of their innate gifts, and to have these gifts approved, acknowledged, and confirmed. There are countless people in the West whose efforts are sadly wasted because they have no means of expressing their unique genius. In the psyches of such people there is an inner power and authority that fails to shine because the world around them is blind to it.
explicacao: Citação de Malidoma Patrice Somé sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Whether they are raised in indigenous or modern culture, there are two things that people crave: …” articula sabedoria, need, purpose em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como purpose.
